items.label: Room
items.info: Typical bedroom or office up to ~150 sq ft.

items.label: Large Room
items.info: Great for family rooms or basements over 225 sq ft.

items.label: Stairway
items.info: Includes treads and risers; add another for long runs.
items.disclaimer: Stairways may stay damp longer; use caution when walking until dry.

items.label: Rug
items.info: In-home cleaning for area rugs (not woven silk).
items.disclaimer: Delicate or loose-back rugs may require off-site cleaning and could incur an adjusted quote.

items.label: Sofa
items.info: Standard 3-seat sofa; add another for sectionals.

packages.label: Quick 3 Rooms
packages.description: Fast checkout for three standard rooms plus a hallway.
packages.disclaimer: Selecting a package disables individual carpet selections.

packages.label: Whole Home
packages.description: Up to five rooms and one hallway, bundled for convenience.
packages.disclaimer: Package replaces carpet a la carte selections.

colorfulStainTiers.disclaimer: 7+ colorful stains require on-site quote; price to be determined.

deodorizeOptions.label: Mild
deodorizeOptions.disclaimer: We will try our best to reduce odors, but deep or old odors may remain after treatment.

deodorizeOptions.label: Max
deodorizeOptions.disclaimer: We will try our best to reduce odors, but deep or old odors may remain after treatment.
